# swipe

Swipe coordinates

## Usage

```bash
agent-device swipe <x1> <y1> <x2> <y2> [durationMs] [--count <n>] [--pause-ms <ms>] [--pattern one-way|ping-pong]
```

## Session Requirement

Usually expects an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--count <n>`: Repeat count for press/swipe series
- `--pause-ms <ms>`: Delay between swipe iterations
- `--pattern one-way|ping-pong`: Swipe repeat pattern

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
